series_metadata.series_description: The Telephone/Cell Phone Invoices list incoming and outgoing calls made by the BWC employees and the costs of the incoming and outgoing calls during a particular time period. The Telephone/Cell Phone Invoices are distributed to the departments each month, and then the invoices are passed out to the BWC employees for their signatures and are kept in the departments.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 2 years provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office 2 years provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, and then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
